## Type of Change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New tool integration
- [ ] New CLI script
- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested with at least one AI agent
- [ ] Follows the skill or tool file format
- [ ] README updated if adding a new skill or tool
- [ ] VERSIONS.md updated with new version and changelog entry
- [ ] No copy-pasted content from external sources
